programme.title: Baroness von Sketch Show
programme.sub-title: Humanity is in an Awkward Stage
programme.desc: A message to extraterrestrials; sending nudes; every office needs a hub.

programme.title: CBC Winnipeg Comedy Festival
programme.desc: Hosted by Maestro Fresh Wes with performances by Keith Pedro, Meg Mackay, DK Phan, Deborah Kimmett, Myles Anderson and Tanyalee Davis.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa unwittingly becomes Jung's soccer coach; Umma insists that Janet should learn how to cook; Shannon forces a birthday party on Stacie.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: A lie from Janet's past hurts Appa's feelings but Umma wants Janet to keep the truth to herself; at Handy, Shannon and Jung struggle with workplace dating dynamics.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Janet is commissioned to take portraits of Shannon's cats; Umma entrusts Jung to pick Appa up from the dentist, but things don't go as planned; Kimchee is threatened by Terence, and a spice challenge ensues.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry decides to make a video presentation for Bully Awareness Week.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry organizes a dance as a fundraiser for the girls basketball team; Robert tells Lisa he had a dream about Trudy.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry sees an opportunity when a job opens up in the physical education department; Lisa is assigned Callaghan's niece.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.sub-title: For the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: Mark's sketch show gets its big break the same night as Fox's mom's wedding; Mary organizes it, and Fox finds the courage to give a speech; Mike Sr. confronts Pop over a health concern.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark's first day of junior high is marred by a bully, a young girl named Fox; when he stands up for himself, he learns that words can hurt more than fists.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis plans a local premiere for the "Crows" movie, and Moira makes a big splash on the red carpet; David tends to Patrick after his wisdom teeth removal.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Moira deal with the aftermath of a viral video, while Johnny helps Bob get back out in the dating world.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira and David sample wine at Herb Ertlinger's vineyard, while Johnny attempts to have "the talk" with Patrick.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira spend a night at the presidential suite in the new motel, while Alexis receives a surprise visitor.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: It's Jenny's bachelorette party, and Val booked a haunted house; when a storm and an unwanted visitor pose a real threat, the ladies must band together if they want to survive the night.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: After a push from Anne, Kate doubles down on micromanaging things at work; her hands-on approach comes under fire.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate disappears on a personal day but neglects to tell her family; an invigorated Sloane reasserts herself at Wynston; Jenny faces a difficult but necessary choice.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate may never have it all, but she's finally closer to finding a balance; Anne has a breakthrough at anger management; Nathan Jr. makes a big decision.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry decides to make a video presentation for Bully Awareness Week.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry organizes a dance as a fundraiser for the girls basketball team; Robert tells Lisa he had a dream about Trudy.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Shannon finds the unexpected during a video for the Gran-Paws program; Paul is convinced to chase his dream; Joy keeps a secret.
